```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([Script Start]) --> ParseArgs[Parse Command Line Arguments]

    InitSQL --> SetConfig[Set Legacy Decimal Config]

    WriteParquet --> ReadBack[Read Back from S3 Parquet]

    GetLatest --> WriteLatest[Write to Latest Path]
    WriteLatest --> End([End])
    ReadJDBC -->|Exception| Error[Log Exception and Raise]
    WriteParquet -->|Exception| Error
    Error --> End
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
graph LR
    main[main function] --> SparkContext
    main --> SQLContext
    main --> get_latest_path
    main --> JDBC[JDBC Read]
    main --> Parquet[Parquet Write]
    get_latest_path --> PathManipulation[Path String Manipulation]
    extract_from_id_query --> QueryBuilder[SQL Query Builder]
    get_last_id --> DataFrame[DataFrame Aggregation]
```

## Diagram 3

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Script
    participant SparkContext
    participant SQLContext
    participant PostgreSQL
    participant S3
    
    Script->>SparkContext: Initialize with YARN
    Script->>SparkContext: Set Spark Configurations
    Script->>SQLContext: Initialize SQLContext
    Script->>SQLContext: Set Legacy Config
    Script->>SQLContext: Read from JDBC
    SQLContext->>PostgreSQL: Query Table Data
    PostgreSQL-->>SQLContext: Return DataFrame
    Script->>S3: Write DataFrame as Parquet
    Script->>S3: Read Back Parquet
    S3-->>Script: Return DataFrame
    Script->>Script: Get Latest Path
    Script->>S3: Write to Latest Path
```
